<xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="entity_add_modifier"><field name="name">outerclothing</field><field name="attribute">MOVEMENT_SPEED</field><field name="operation">ADD_VALUE</field><field name="permanent">TRUE</field><value name="value"><block type="math_dual_ops"><field name="OP">MINUS</field><value name="A"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0</field></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_dual_ops" inline="false"><field name="OP">MULTIPLY</field><comment pinned="false" h="80" w="160">Уменьшает скорость на 20%
(умножаем на обратное - 0.8)</comment><value name="A"><block type="entity_get_attribute_base_value"><field name="attribute">MOVEMENT_SPEED</field><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0.2</field></block></value></block></value></block></value><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><next><block type="play_sound"><field name="sound">CUSTOM:equip_base_equip</field><field name="soundcategory">player</field><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><value name="level"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value><value name="pitch"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
